content.query:
IF OBJECT_ID('EDW.FACT_F9_AGENT_LOGIN_LOGOUT')  IS NOT NULL 
DROP TABLE [EDW].[FACT_F9_AGENT_LOGIN_LOGOUT]

GO

CREATE TABLE EDW.FACT_F9_AGENT_LOGIN_LOGOUT
(
DIVISION NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
AGENT_NAME NVARCHAR(255),
DATE DATETIME,
LOGIN_LOGOUT NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,  
REASON_CODE NVARCHAR(255),
TIME TIME,
LAST_UPDATED_TS DATETIME
);
